perks.name: Bestial Strength
perks.description: Deal 20% more attack damage in beast form.

perks.name: Bestial Strength
perks.description: Deal 30% more attack damage in beast form.

perks.name: Bestial Strength
perks.description: Deal 40% more attack damage in beast form.

perks.name: Bestial Strength
perks.description: Deal 50% more attack damage in beast form.

perks.name: Animal Vigor
perks.description: Additional 50 point bonus to Health and Stamina in beast form.

perks.name: Gorging
perks.description: Feeding heals 100 points more.

perks.name: Savage Feeding
perks.description: Able to feed off the undead in beast form, and loot their corpses.

perks.name: Rampage
perks.description: Beast form lasts 50% longer and feeding extends the duration 50% more.

perks.name: Feral Instincts
perks.description: Power attacks in beast form cost 25% less Stamina and do 25% more damage.

perks.name: Infinite Duress
perks.description: Frenzy attacks (one-handed standing power attacks) in beast form stun targets for the duration.

perks.name: Supernatural Strength
perks.description: Back hand attacks (two-handed standing power attacks) in beast form disarm targets.

perks.name: Roadkill
perks.description: Leap attacks (two-handed sprinting power attacks) in beast form do a critical strike equal to half your current Stamina and throw targets.

perks.name: Swipe
perks.description: Power attacks in beast form can hit multiple targets in front of you.

perks.name: Improved Bloodthirst
perks.description: Beast form attacks do an additional 5 points of bleed damage, healing you for the same amount.

perks.name: Improved Bloodthirst
perks.description: Beast form attacks do an additional 10 points of bleed damage, healing you for the same amount.

perks.name: Lycanthropic Speed
perks.description: Movement speed is increased by 10%, both in and out of beast form.

perks.name: Lycanthropic Regeneration
perks.description: Regenerate an additional 1% of your maximum Health and Stamina per second, both in and out of beast form.

perks.name: Lycanthropic Regeneration
perks.description: Regenerate an additional 2% of your maximum Health and Stamina per second, both in and out of beast form.

perks.name: Totem of Terror
perks.description: Werebeast Howl of Terror affects even dragons, forcing them to land for 30 seconds.

perks.name: Totem of Terror
perks.description: Werebeast Howl of Terror affects even dragons, forcing them to land for 60 seconds.

perks.name: Totem of the Hunt
perks.description: Werebeast Howl of the Hunt shatters locks up to Adept level at close range.

perks.name: Totem of the Hunt
perks.description: Werebeast Howl of the Hunt shatters locks up to Expert level at close range.

perks.name: Totem of Ice Brothers
perks.description: Werebeast Howl of Brotherhood calls Ice Wolves instead.

perks.name: Totem of Ice Brothers
perks.description: Werebeast Howl of Brotherhood calls Snow Bears, Werewolves, or Werebears instead.

perks.name: Bury the Beast
perks.description: No longer forced to transform at night.

perks.name: Wolf Among Men
perks.description: The frequency of Silver Hand Elite werebeast hunters is reduced by 80%.

perks.name: Spread the Beastblood
perks.description: Give your follower the beastblood by trading Werebeast Blood with them. No effect on vampires.
